description: Read Twitter/X notifications with type filtering. Extracts notification type (mention, like, retweet, follow), actor handle, associated tweet text, and timestamp. Supports all/mentions/likes/retweets filter modes.
author: stillwater

reasoning.research: Twitter/X notifications page at x.com/notifications renders notification items as div[data-testid='notification'] or within a timeline list. The 'All' tab shows all notification types; the 'Mentions' tab shows only @mentions. Each notification has an actor (user who performed action), an action type indicator, and optionally a linked tweet. The notification bell icon in sidebar links to /notifications.
reasoning.selector_strategy: Navigate directly to x.com/notifications for the All tab. Use x.com/notifications/mentions for the Mentions tab. Notification items use data-testid='notification' where available; fall back to article[data-testid='tweet'] since mention notifications embed tweet previews.
reasoning.anti_bot_notes: Read-only operation — minimal bot detection risk. Page may require scroll to load older notifications. Avoid rapid extraction; add 500ms pause between scroll steps.
reasoning.performance: Expected run time: 8-12 seconds (navigation 3s + load 2s + extraction 3-7s). No typing needed.

filter.description: Notification filter: 'all' (all notifications), 'mentions' (@ mentions only), 'likes' (likes only), 'retweets' (retweets/reposts only)

count.description: Maximum number of notifications to read. Default 20.

steps.description: Navigate to Twitter/X notifications page and wait for primary column
Verify authenticated — if redirected to login flow, abort with SESSION_EXPIRED
Navigate to Mentions-only notifications if filter is 'mentions'
Wait for notification items to render in the timeline
Extract notification entries from the notifications timeline
Return extracted notifications as structured data

error_handling.session_expired: Detect x.com/i/flow/login redirect — abort with SESSION_EXPIRED, re-run session login recipe first
error_handling.empty_notifications: Return empty notifications array — not an error, just no new activity
error_handling.element_not_found: Log selector tried, capture screenshot, try fallback_selector if defined
error_handling.rate_limited: If rate limit indicator detected, wait 60s then retry once
error_handling.mentions_tab_not_found: Fall back to all-notifications page and filter client-side by notification_type
